subject: Fermi GBM trigger 479509107/160312874 is not a GRB
body:
P. Veres (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 479509107/160312874 
at 20:58:23.83 UT on 12 March 2016, tentatively classified as a GRB, 
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a particle event.
